title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at India Ratings

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at India Ratings
jsonLd.description:
India Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Ratings:
India Ratings is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings!
